text: Hi Nikhil, I just wanted to show you how you can get to this page where you can add credit card. Let me just walk you through. So after you log in this will be the link. I'll Send a link ads.instacart.com and once you log in you will see this page. Once you accept the invite and login you will see this page. And then if you are let's say not on this page for joy burst you have to click on this icon here, click on switch accounts and make sure you're on the jobberst account. Okay and right now I'm on the joburst account. So from here let me show you where you can how you can add the credit card. So again you have to click here, click on settings, then billing. Then you have to edit credit card from here and you have to input it here. All right, that is all. Thank you so much.
